.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 17 instead of Java 9 to match the target JDK version.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.before: super(String.format("Could not find %s by id=%d", name, id));
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.after: super("Could not find %s by id=%d".formatted(name, id));

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Remove global TypeDef annotations for JSON types in favor of explicit type references.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: Global TypeDefs are no longer required or supported in the same way with the updated hibernate-types library configuration.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Update @Type annotation to use class reference instead of string name.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: String-based type names are less type-safe and may fail if global definitions are removed; class reference is the modern standard.
